title: Word Embeddings
summary: Dense vector representations of words, often used in natural language processing tasks. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Representation. Compare it with Word Embeddings (Word2Vec, GloVe) and Word2Vec embeddings. It opens into Word Embeddings (Word2Vec, GloVe) and static word embeddings.
